Python_Leetcode_with_code.title: Valid Anagram
Python_Leetcode_with_code.description: Determine if two strings are anagrams of each other.
Python_Leetcode_with_code.code:
def isAnagram(s,t):
    return sorted(s)==sorted(t)
Python_Leetcode_with_code.valuation: Missing spaces around operators and after commas. No docstring. Single-letter variable names. No type hints.

Python_Leetcode_with_code.description: Check if a number is a power of two.

Python_Leetcode_with_code.description: Check if an array contains duplicate elements.
